name: bd-console
description: Standalone, project-agnostic viewer + light editor for beads issues and a project's docs.

scripts.check: node --check serve.mjs && node --check public/app.js && node --check scripts/init.mjs && node --check scripts/smoke.mjs && node --check scripts/serve-static.mjs && node --check lib/paths.mjs && node --check lib/registry.mjs && node --check lib/config.mjs && node --check lib/bd.mjs && node --check lib/docs.mjs && node --check lib/routes.mjs && node --check lib/daemon.mjs && node --check lib/systemd.mjs && node --check lib/update.mjs && node --check lib/settings.mjs
